caseNameFull: BNSF RAILWAY CO. v. Kelli TYRRELL, Special Administrator for the Estate of Brent T. TYRRELL
attorneys: Motion of National Association of Manufacturers for leave to file a brief as amicus curiae granted. Motion of The Chamber of Commerce of the United States of America, et al. for leave to file a brief as amici curiae granted. Motion of The Association of American Railroads for leave to file a brief as amicus curiae granted. Motion of Washington Legal Foundation for leave to file a brief as amicus curiae granted. Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Montana granted.
